articles.description: Only three games in, Tottenham's head coach is facing crisis. Igor Tudor refused to comment on whether he is about to be sacked - but said some players will need "to leave the boat".
articles.title: Tottenham 1-3 Crystal Palace: 'Disbelief' - thousands leave early as Spurs in freefall

articles.description: Brendon McCullum wants to stay as England coach but it is still up for debate whether he will get that chance, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: Brendon McCullum wants to stay as England coach - but will that be enough?

articles.description: The 2026 Women's Africa Cup of Nations is postponed just 12 days before the finals were due to kick off in Morocco.

articles.description: BBC Sport explores the potential financial impact should Spurs be relegated to the Championship.
articles.title: Tottenham: How Premier League relegation could cost Spurs more than £250m

articles.description: Luke Littler beats Premier League leader Jonny Clayton 6-4 in a top class final at Utilita Arena in Cardiff.
articles.title: Premier League Darts 2026 results: Luke Littler spoils Welsh party with win in Cardiff
